question: No sesame seeds on my burger, I'm allergic

history.speaker: client
history.text: No sesame seeds on my burger, I'm allergic

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Just so you know, we don't have any burgers with sesame seeds. Which one would you like?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Okay, I'll take the sesame-free burger.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it, we have a sesame-free Hamburger. Anything else for you today?
